The '''440 Super-Heavy Armored Chassis''' was a ground vehicle chassis produced by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]]. The [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] used them to mount [[v-188 Penetrator]]s.

{{Veh-stub}}
